name: rewrite-only-no-execution
description: Checks that prompt-rewrite returns a copyable improved prompt without doing the underlying task.
user_request: Use $prompt-rewrite to improve this prompt for Codex, but only rewrite it and do not do the task: check my app and tell me if it is ready to ship
context: The user asked for prompt improvement only.
There is no app URL or repo path supplied.
expected_behavior: Returns an improved prompt rather than inspecting files, running commands, or reviewing an app.
Adds concrete readiness criteria such as tests, browser checks, blockers, and PR/ship gate.
Uses a concise copyable prompt format.
red_flags: Claims to have checked the app.
Runs or asks to run validation commands for the underlying app.
Turns the request into a broad product audit instead of a prompt rewrite.
